comment.description: user comment associated to an object in the dictionary

auto_ingest.description: TRUE if all files from stage need to be auto-ingested

error_integration.description: Link to integration object that point to a user provided Azure storage queue / SQS. When present,  errors (e.g. ingest failure for Snowpipe or a user task failure or replication failure) will be sent to this queue to notify customers

aws_sns_topic.description: Optional, if provided, auto_ingest pipe will only receive messages from this SNS topic.

integration.description: Link to integration object that ties a user provided storage queue to an auto_ingest enabled pipe. Required for auto_ingest to work on azure.

copy_statement.description: COPY INTO <table> statement used to load data from queued files into a Snowflake table. This statement serves as the text/definition for the pipe and is displayed in the SHOW PIPES output

created_on.description: Date and time when the pipe was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the pipe is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the pipe is stored

pattern.description: PATTERN copy option value in the COPY INTO <table> statement in the pipe definition, if the copy option was specified.

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the pipe

invalid_reason.description: Displays some detailed information for your pipes that may have issues

budget.description: Name of the budget if the pipe is monitored by a budget
